hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && [ "$f" != "null" ] || exit 0; root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; case "$f" in *.py) uv run ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; git add "$f" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; rel=$(git ls-files --full-name "$f" 2>/dev/null || basename "$f"); git commit -m "Update $rel"; } 2>/dev/null || true
